MC	<p>a719_49cc</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>8800_e453</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>bbb2_a5d0</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>1357_9a63</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>94ab_e98e</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. A visible reaction indicates the presence or absence of the corresponding antigens.</p><p>What would the test results look like for someone with <strong><span style="font-size: 1.2em;">AB+ blood type</span></strong>?</p>	<p><table style="border-collapse: collapse; MC	<p>94ab_850f</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>1357_7271</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>94ab_2559</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>ca46_1251</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>1357_6899</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. A visible reaction indicates the presence or absence of the corresponding antigens.</p><p>What would the test results look like for someone with <strong><span style="font-size: 1.2em;">A+ blood type</span></strong>?</p>	<p><table style="border-collapse: collapse; MC	<p>94ab_2cf7</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>ca46_173a</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control. MC	<p>a719_a5b8</p> <p>During a blood typing test, anti-A, anti-B, and anti-D antibodies are added to a blood sample along with a control.
